en_title: Avengers: Doomsday Trailer Has Some Fans Saying Marvel Should Have Built Up Towards Doctor Doom's Appearance Like It Did for Thanos — but There's a Clear Counterpoint
cn_title: 《复仇者联盟：毁灭之日》毁灭博士登场是否太仓促？
subtitle: 无需十年铺垫

paragraphs.en: As the dust settles on the Avengers: Doomsday trailer , I’ve seen a mixed reception emerge. There’s plenty of excitement about the first Avengers movie since 2019’s all-conquering Endgame, and much fun speculation about the true nature of Steve Rogers' appearance . Clearly, the mainstream audience is on board, too, with impressive day-one advance ticket sales and huge views for the trailer itself .
paragraphs.cn: 随着《复仇者联盟：毁灭之日》预告片引发的热潮逐渐沉淀，我看到的评价开始变得褒贬不一。大家很期待这部继2019年横扫市场的《复仇者联盟4：终局之战》后首部《复仇者联盟》电影，也热烈猜测Steve Rogers此次现身的真正性质。主流观众显然也很买账，影片首日预售票房亮眼，预告片本身观看量也十分庞大。

paragraphs.en: But tempering the excitement somewhat are complaints not just around the visual effects we see in the trailer, or a perceived reinforcement of MCU fatigue some say they feel while watching the trailer, but Doctor Doom’s star turn as the villain.
paragraphs.cn: 不过，这股兴奋多少受到一些批评影响。争议不只围绕预告片中的视觉特效，或有人观看后感受到的MCU疲劳加剧，也包括毁灭博士作为核心反派的高调登场。

paragraphs.en: My timeline is full of people saying that the introduction of Doctor Doom feels rushed, that it should have been built up over the course of multiple movies for fans to feel the excitement of a pay off much like the one they got when the Avengers teamed up to battle Thanos. Thanos, let's remember, appeared in cameo form in 2014’s Guardians of the Galaxy and 2015’s Avengers: Age of Ultron before starring in 2018's Infinity War and finally biting the dust in Endgame. Indeed, Thanos first reared his ugly head all the way back in 2012’s The Avengers.
paragraphs.cn: 我的时间线上到处有人说，毁灭博士的引入显得仓促；漫威本应通过多部电影逐步铺垫，才能让粉丝在他正式登场时获得类似复仇者集结对抗灭霸的回报感。别忘了，灭霸在主演2018年的《复仇者联盟3：无限战争》、并最终于《复仇者联盟4：终局之战》败亡前，曾在2014年的《银河护卫队》和2015年的《复仇者联盟2：奥创纪元》中客串。事实上，灭霸最早在2012年的《复仇者联盟》中就已露面。

paragraphs.en: Doctor Doom, played by Iron Man actor Robert Downey Jr., however, has had little to no build up. Yes, he appeared, menacingly, at the end of last year’s The Fantastic Four: First Steps with Reed Richards and Sue Storm’s son, Franklin (we’re still not sure what Doom wants with him). But that’s it, which leaves us with a debut appearance in this December’s Avengers: Doomsday.
paragraphs.cn: 相比之下，由钢铁侠演员Robert Downey Jr.饰演的毁灭博士几乎没有铺垫。没错，他去年曾在《神奇四侠：初露锋芒》结尾带着威胁意味地现身，与Reed Richards和Sue Storm的儿子Franklin同框（我们仍不知道毁灭博士想从他身上得到什么）。但除此之外再无内容，因此今年12月的《复仇者联盟：毁灭之日》就成了他的正式首秀。

paragraphs.en: This, some say, is evidence of Marvel Studios’ rushed attempt to create a big bad for its cinematic universe after the plan for Kang fell apart. Doom is the MCU's Hail Mary, a last-ditch attempt to rekindle the glory days amid waning interest in superheroes. But, others counter, there is hope amid the doom and gloom.
paragraphs.cn: 有人认为，这证明征服者康计划破产后，漫威影业仓促为电影宇宙打造了一个终极反派。毁灭博士是MCU孤注一掷的「万福玛利亚式长传」，试图在超级英雄热度下降之际重现辉煌年代。不过也有人反驳，在这片悲观气氛中仍有希望。

paragraphs.en: Let us consider the many, many wonderful villains who have graced our screens without any build up at all. Darth Vader didn’t need a handful of cameo appearances before be became perhaps the greatest villain of all time in A New Hope. I don’t remember Hannibal Lecter making weird noises from the shadows in movies set before The Silence of the Lambs. Nor did Sauron require the hours and hours of origin story we have subsequently received for The Fellowship of the Ring’s journey to Mordor to hit hard.
paragraphs.cn: 想想那些完全没有任何铺垫、却登上银幕的众多精彩反派。Darth Vader不需要先在几部电影里客串，就能在《星球大战：新希望》中成为或许是影史最伟大的反派。我也不记得Hannibal Lecter曾在《沉默的羔羊》之前的电影中躲在阴影里发出怪声。索伦同样不需要后来那些长达数小时的起源故事，才能让《指环王：护戒使者》的魔多之旅足够震撼。

paragraphs.en: Perhaps the best example of a successful villain who needed little introduction came from the MCU itself. I’ve always thought of Ultron as the standout character in the otherwise disappointing Avengers: Age of Ultron. This was a villain who wasn’t just introduced and defeated all in one movie, but created.
paragraphs.cn: 或许，几乎不需介绍便获得成功的反派最佳例子就来自MCU本身。我一直认为，在整体令人失望的《复仇者联盟2：奥创纪元》中，奥创是最出彩的角色。这名反派不仅在一部电影里完成登场与败亡，甚至也是在同一部电影中被创造出来的。

paragraphs.en: So, it’s perfectly reasonable to expect a successful introduction of Doctor Doom in Avengers: Doomsday, which I'm sure will be long enough to accommodate plenty of exposition. It will, as most things in movies do, come down to the story, the characters, the direction, and of course the performances of the actors. I don’t need a build up to Doom’s reveal for Robert Downey Jr.'s inevitable 'how can you have Tony Stark’s face?' conversation with Thor and Captain America to get my heart racing. To dismiss Doomsday now because we haven’t had a few Doom teases beforehand seems a little premature.
paragraphs.cn: 因此，我们完全有理由期待《复仇者联盟：毁灭之日》成功引入毁灭博士；我相信影片片长足以容纳大量背景说明。和电影中的大多数事一样，成败最终取决于故事、角色、导演，当然还有演员表演。即便没有提前铺垫毁灭博士，仅凭Robert Downey Jr.与雷神和美国队长之间必然会出现的「你怎么会长着Tony Stark的脸？」对话，就足以让我心跳加速。仅仅因为此前没有几次毁灭博士预告，就现在否定《毁灭之日》，似乎为时过早。

paragraphs.en: In any case, Doomsday might be the Doom setup. While he's the main event in the Doomsday trailer, we may not see much of the character in the movie itself. Rather, the big fights and Doom debates may be reserved for next year's Secret Wars. We might not even see Doom take off his mask in Doomsday, or any other character see his face.
paragraphs.cn: 无论如何，《毁灭之日》本身可能就是毁灭博士的铺垫。虽然他是预告片的核心，正片里可能并不会出现太多。真正的大战与围绕他的争论，或许会留到明年的《秘密战争》。我们甚至可能不会在《毁灭之日》中看到毁灭博士摘下面具，也不会有其他角色看见他的脸。

paragraphs.en: While we wait to find out how this Doom thing is going to go, we’ve got plenty more on Avengers: Doomsday to digest. For example, there's a debate about whether a character was edited out of one shot from the trailer. Is it Doctor Doom? Speaking of Doom, we also have a new Avengers: Doomsday poster that teases Doctor Doom's motivation in the story.
paragraphs.cn: 在等待毁灭博士剧情究竟如何展开期间，还有许多《复仇者联盟：毁灭之日》内容值得研究。例如，有人正在争论预告片某个镜头是否删掉了一名角色。会是毁灭博士吗？说到他，新的《复仇者联盟：毁灭之日》海报也暗示了毁灭博士在故事中的动机。

paragraphs.en: Avengers: Doomsday hits theaters December 18, 2026. Here's the official synopsis:
paragraphs.cn: 《复仇者联盟：毁灭之日》将于2026年12月18日登陆影院。以下是官方剧情简介：

paragraphs.en: "Universes collide and the Multiverse Saga begins its final chapter in Marvel Studios' Avengers: Doomsday," the movie's newly-revealed description reads . "Beloved heroes from three distinct universes will be set on a deadly collision course and ultimately face an existential threat unlike anything they've ever encountered. This epic film will lay the foundation for the future of the Marvel Cinematic Universe."
paragraphs.cn: 影片最新简介写道：「在漫威影业《复仇者联盟：毁灭之日》中，多个宇宙发生碰撞，多元宇宙传奇进入最终篇章。来自三个不同宇宙、深受喜爱的英雄将踏上致命的碰撞之路，最终面对前所未见的生存威胁。这部史诗电影将为漫威电影宇宙的未来奠定基础。」

summary: 《复仇者联盟：毁灭之日》预告引发争论：部分粉丝认为毁灭博士缺少类似灭霸的多年铺垫，但也有人指出，许多经典反派无需前作预热，角色成败最终取决于故事与表演。
opus_summary: 部分观众认为毁灭博士缺少灭霸式的多年铺垫，像是漫威临时救场。不过经典反派并非都需要提前亮相；《毁灭之日》本身也可能只是为《秘密战争》建立角色。
